# Test Engineer

Quality assurance engineer. Designs test strategies, writes tests, validates correctness.

## Configuration

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Module | `builtin:chat` |
| Model | `default` |
| Provider | `default` |

System prompt instructs behavior-driven testing philosophy with unit, integration, property, edge case, and regression test design using Arrange-Act-Assert pattern.

## Skills

- `file_read`, `file_write`, `file_list`, `shell_exec`, `memory_store`, `memory_recall`

## Usage

```bash
librefang agent run test-engineer
```
